subcodes.first_line: There hath appeared before the Throne he who was named 'Alí, before Nabíl, whom We made manifest through Our hallowed Name. Verily thy Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد حضر لدی العرش من سمی بعلی قبل نبیل الذی اظهرناه من اسمنا المقدس ان ربک
subcodes.subjects: @power of prayer, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
